design_plan: rng=42; AIDA: Attention(hero recruiting pain), Interest(computer-use trend), Desire(cache reuse for sourcing/interviews), Action(CTA); hero math: 68px clamp → 2–3 lines @1120px; bento density verified via grid-auto-flow:dense; competitors sweep included; button contrast checked (ink/white).
headline: Super for recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews

site_brief.audience: recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work.
queries: recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews AI assistant
recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews

summary: A conversion‑focused niche landing page for recruiters who live inside LinkedIn, ATS tools, calendars, and email. The page ties current evidence about computer‑use agents (notably Gemini 3.5 Flash) to real recruiting pain points, then positions Super as the sharper alternative for repeated sourcing and interview coordination workflows thanks to its reusable computer‑use cache.
